items.title_en: DR Congo cancels World Cup training camp over Ebola outbreak
items.title_zh: 刚果民主共和国因埃博拉疫情取消世界杯训练营
items.desc_en: The outbreak, caused by a rare Ebola species, is thought to have caused 139 deaths so far.
items.desc_zh: 此次疫情由一种罕见的埃博拉病毒引起，据信迄今为止已造成 139 人死亡。

items.title_en: India has a new political superstar - a cockroach
items.title_zh: 印度出现了一位新的政治巨星——蟑螂
items.desc_en: India’s newest political movement started with an insult - and led to people proudly dressing up as cockroaches.
items.desc_zh: 印度最新的政治运动以侮辱开始，并导致人们自豪地打扮成蟑螂。

items.title_en: Ubisoft shares plunge 14% after Assassin’s Creed maker warns of annual profit loss
items.title_zh: 《刺客信条》制造商警告年度利润损失后，育碧股价暴跌 14%
items.desc_en: Ubisoft shares plunged on Thursday after the Assassin's Creed maker warned of further losses this year.
items.desc_zh: 在《刺客信条》制造商育碧警告今年将进一步亏损后，其股价周四暴跌。

items.title_en: Tesla brings 'Full Self-Driving' to China after years of delays as local EV rivals race ahead
items.title_zh: 特斯拉在拖延多年后将“全自动驾驶”引入中国，当地电动汽车竞争对手竞相领先
items.desc_en: Tesla's full self-driving (FSD) capabilities are now available in China after years of delay, the company said in an X post on Thursday.
items.desc_zh: 特斯拉周四在 X 帖子中表示，经过多年的延迟，特斯拉的全自动驾驶 (FSD) 功能现已在中国推出。

items.title_en: Iran reviews U.S. peace proposal as Trump says he’s willing to wait 'a few days'
items.title_zh: 特朗普表示愿意等待“几天”，伊朗正在审查美国的和平提议
items.desc_en: It comes after President Donald Trump said he was prepared to wait a few more days to "get the right answers" from Tehran.
items.desc_zh: 此前，唐纳德·特朗普总统表示，他准备再等几天，以便从德黑兰“得到正确的答案”。

items.title_en: Inflation fears are rippling through industrial metals. Here's where prices could go next
items.title_zh: 通胀担忧正在席卷工业金属。这是价格下一步可能走向的地方
items.desc_en: The moves came amid broader volatile trade in global bond and equity markets, faced with fears of resurgent inflation.
items.desc_zh: 这些举措是在全球债券和股票市场交易更广泛波动、面临通胀复苏的担忧之际做出的。

items.title_en: Treasury yields resume climb as traders monitor inflation risks
items.title_zh: 随着交易员监控通胀风险，国债收益率恢复攀升
items.desc_en: Borrowing costs edged higher Thursday as investors eye ongoing inflationary pressures in the U.S. economy.
items.desc_zh: 由于投资者关注美国经济持续的通胀压力，周四借贷成本小幅走高。

items.title_en: Final two bodies of missing Italians recovered from inside Maldives cave
items.title_zh: 马尔代夫洞穴内发现最后两具失踪意大利人尸体

items.desc_zh: 两人是上周在马尔代夫发生的水肺潜水事故中溺水身亡的五名意大利公民之一。

items.title_en: Whale to be removed from Danish island after failed German rescue
items.title_zh: 德国救援失败后，鲸鱼将被从丹麦岛上移走
items.desc_en: Danish officials will conduct a post mortem examination on the whale, which was released into the sea from a barge more than two weeks ago.
items.desc_zh: 丹麦官员将对这头鲸鱼进行尸检，这头鲸鱼是两周前从驳船上被释放到海里的。

items.title_en: Far-right Israeli minister condemned for taunting handcuffed Gaza flotilla activists
items.title_zh: 以色列极右翼部长因嘲笑戴手铐的加沙船队活动人士而受到谴责
items.desc_en: France and Italy are among the countries that have criticised a video showing Itamar Ben-Gvir taunting dozens of activists detained at an Israeli port.
items.desc_zh: 法国和意大利等国批评了一段视频，该视频显示伊塔马尔·本格维尔嘲讽了被拘留在以色列港口的数十名活动人士。

items.title_en: Murder or accident? Mystery of Mango tycoon's hiking death after son's arrest
items.title_zh: 谋杀还是意外？芒果大亨儿子被捕后徒步死亡之谜
items.desc_en: Isak Andic's son Jonathan denies involvement in the fatal fall of his father, who founded one of Europe's biggest clothing empires.
items.desc_zh: 伊萨克·安迪奇 (Isak Andic) 的儿子乔纳森 (Jonathan) 否认与他父亲的倒台有关，他的父亲创立了欧洲最大的服装帝国之一。

items.title_en: Jeff Bezos says there is ‘no truth’ to the ‘buy borrow die’ tax strategy
items.title_zh: 杰夫·贝佐斯表示“买借模具”税收策略“没有事实依据”
items.desc_en: The "buy, borrow, die" strategy refers to the practice of wealthy founders or investors borrowing against their assets and using the loan proceeds as income.
items.desc_zh: “买、借、死”策略是指富有的创始人或投资者以其资产为抵押借款并将贷款收益作为收入的做法。

items.title_en: US military jets and drones tracked near Cuba as tensions rise

items.desc_zh: 跟踪数据显示，美国海军侦察机和无人机在上周进行了多次飞行。

items.title_en: Bezos brushes off concerns of an AI bubble: 'You shouldn't worry about it'
items.title_zh: 贝索斯消除了对人工智能泡沫的担忧：“你不应该担心它”
items.desc_en: Amazon founder Jeff Bezos shrugged off concerns of a looming AI bubble, saying the massive investments will ultimately drive the technology forward over time.
items.desc_zh: 亚马逊创始人杰夫·贝索斯（Jeff Bezos）对人工智能泡沫迫在眉睫的担忧不以为然，他表示，随着时间的推移，大规模投资最终将推动该技术向前发展。

items.title_en: Barney Frank: One of the first openly gay US congressmen dies aged 86
items.title_zh: 巴尼·弗兰克 (Barney Frank)：首批公开同性恋身份的美国国会议员之一去世，享年 86 岁
items.desc_en: After a decades-long career in Congress, he spent his final weeks at his home in Maine living in hospice.
items.desc_zh: 在国会度过了数十年的职业生涯后，他在缅因州的家中临终关怀中心度过了最后几周。

items.title_en: ‘He sacrificed his life’: security guard killed in San Diego mosque attack hailed as hero - The Guardian
items.title_zh: “他牺牲了自己的生命”：在圣地亚哥清真寺袭击中丧生的保安被誉为英雄 - 《卫报》
items.desc_en: ‘He sacrificed his life’: security guard killed in San Diego mosque attack hailed as hero  The GuardianExperts: Mosque shooters followed familiar path of far-right radicalization  KPBSThe teens who at
items.desc_zh: “他牺牲了自己的生命”：在圣地亚哥清真寺袭击中丧生的保安被誉为英雄《卫报》专家：清真寺枪击者遵循了熟悉的极右激进化道路

items.title_en: College career path ‘over’ as skilled trade get 30% pay bump, recruitment giant says
items.title_zh: 招聘巨头称，随着技术贸易加薪30%，大学职业道路“结束”
items.desc_en: "I would say you can make a good career and good money in skilled trade. That's definitely a career track," CEO of world's largest recruitment firm told CNBC.
items.desc_zh: 全球最大招聘公司的首席执行官告诉 CNBC：“我想说，你可以在技术贸易中获得一份不错的职业生涯并赚到很多钱。这绝对是一条职业道路。”

items.title_en: More die of suspected Ebola as WHO warns that numbers will rise further
items.title_zh: 世界卫生组织警告称，更多人死于疑似埃博拉病毒，死亡人数将进一步上升
items.desc_en: In its latest update, the World Health Organization says there have now been 139 suspected deaths and 600 cases.
items.desc_zh: 世界卫生组织在最新更新中表示，目前已有 139 例疑似死亡病例和 600 例病例。

items.title_en: MKs advance bill to dissolve Knesset, potentially trigger slightly earlier elections - The Times of Israel
items.title_zh: MKs 推进解散以色列议会的法案，可能引发稍微提前的选举 - 以色列时报
items.desc_en: MKs advance bill to dissolve Knesset, potentially trigger slightly earlier elections  The Times of IsraelIsrael's parliament has voted to dissolve itself. What's next?  ReutersIsraeli lawmakers advanc
items.desc_zh: MKs 提出解散以色列议会的法案，可能会引发稍早举行的选举 以色列时报 以色列议会已投票决定解散议会。接下来怎么办？  路透社以色列议员推进

items.title_en: Lithuania's leaders take shelter during drone air alert
items.title_zh: 立陶宛领导人在无人机空中警报期间避难
items.desc_en: Flights were suspended and people were urged to take shelter after a suspected drone was detected near the Belarus border.
items.desc_zh: 在白俄罗斯边境附近发现疑似无人机后，航班暂停，并敦促人们避难。

items.title_en: US groups urge investigation into child safety and spending on Roblox
items.title_zh: 美国团体敦促对儿童安全和 Roblox 支出进行调查
items.desc_en: Roblox said it had "clear policies" banning actual and simulated gambling, as well as rules governing paid random items.
items.desc_zh: Roblox 表示，它有“明确的政策”禁止实际和模拟赌博，以及管理付费随机项目的规则。

items.title_en: Google to release first smart glasses since Google Glass flop
items.title_zh: 谷歌将推出自谷歌眼镜失败以来首款智能眼镜
items.desc_en: The glasses will go on sale sometime in autumn and allow Google's artificial intelligence product to interact with a user.
items.desc_zh: 这款眼镜将于秋季某个时候上市销售，让谷歌的人工智能产品能够与用户互动。

items.title_en: Zoe Kleinman: Why the AI industry is the real winner of the Musk-Altman trial
items.title_zh: Zoe Kleinman：为什么人工智能行业是马斯克-奥特曼试验的真正赢家
items.desc_en: The trial in Oakland, California has helped lift the veil on the AI sector - and the huge egos of the men at the heart of it.
items.desc_zh: 加利福尼亚州奥克兰的试验揭开了人工智能领域的面纱，以及该领域核心人物的巨大自负。

items.title_en: Robo-top: The machines that could make your next t-shirt
items.title_zh: Robo-top：可以为你制作下一件 T 恤的机器
items.desc_en: Most clothes are made in Asia, but new machines could bring some of that work back to the West.
items.desc_zh: 大多数衣服都是在亚洲制造的，但新机器可以将部分工作带回西方。

items.title_en: Satellites and AI used to track UK hedgehogs in bid to slow decline
items.title_zh: 卫星和人工智能用于追踪英国刺猬以减缓其数量下降
items.desc_en: Researchers hope the project will also help to identify barriers preventing hedgehogs from finding food and mates in the wild.
items.desc_zh: 研究人员希望该项目还能帮助找出刺猬在野外寻找食物和交配的障碍。

items.title_en: Elon Musk just lost another lawsuit. Will he keep fighting?
items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克刚刚又输掉了另一场官司。他会继续战斗吗？
items.desc_en: Musk's loss against OpenAI is the latest in a string of courtroom defeats.
items.desc_zh: 马斯克输给 OpenAI 是一系列法庭失败中的最新一起。

items.title_en: Jury tosses Elon Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI and its boss Sam Altman
items.title_zh: 陪审团驳回埃隆·马斯克对 OpenAI 及其老板萨姆·奥尔特曼的诉讼
items.desc_en: Jurors spent nearly a month hearing and viewing evidence in the high-profile trial, where Musk had accused Altman of "stealing a charity".
items.desc_zh: 陪审员们花了近一个月的时间在这场备受瞩目的审判中听取和查看证据，马斯克在审判中指控奥特曼“窃取慈善机构”。

items.title_en: Instant AI answers can trivialise human intelligence, warns Royal Observatory
items.title_zh: 皇家天文台警告说，即时人工智能答案可能会削弱人类智能
items.desc_en: Paddy Rodgers said the Observatory's rich history showed the power of human knowledge and the need to avoid "dependence" on AI.
items.desc_zh: 帕迪·罗杰斯表示，天文台丰富的历史表明了人类知识的力量以及避免“依赖”人工智能的必要性。

items.title_zh: X 承诺对英国的仇恨和恐怖内容采取更快的行动
items.desc_en: Ofcom said the commitments were of particular importance after recent crimes targeting Jewish communities in the UK.
items.desc_zh: Ofcom 表示，在英国最近发生针对犹太社区的犯罪事件后，这些承诺尤为重要。

items.title_en: Claim, counter-claim and tech's seedy side exposed: Five things we learned in the Musk-Altman trial
items.title_zh: 索赔、反索赔和科技的肮脏一面暴露：我们在马斯克-奥特曼审判中学到的五件事
items.desc_en: As the jury deliberates, this is what we found out during the weeks-long trial with two tech titans at its heart.
items.desc_zh: 正如陪审团审议的那样，这是我们在以两位科技巨头为核心的长达数周的审判中发现的结果。

items.title_en: Inside the secretive and lucrative world of orchid breeding
items.title_zh: 走进兰花育种的秘密和利润丰厚的世界
items.desc_en: It can take a decade to bring a new orchid to market, so breeders keep their hi-tech processes secret.
items.desc_zh: 将新兰花推向市场可能需要十年的时间，因此育种者对其高科技流程保密。
